title: Shop definition (v2)
description: A shopkeeper NPC's wares, bound to a single room. v2 adds an optional per-stock-entry `min_reputation` gate: an entry is only purchasable by a player whose standing with the shop's `faction_id` is at least this value. Omitting it preserves the v1 always-purchasable behaviour, so faction-neutral shops and ungated entries need no changes.

room_id.description: Id of the room this shop is available in.

faction_id.description: Optional faction this shop is aligned with. When set, buy/sell prices shift with the player's reputation, and `min_reputation` gates are evaluated against the player's standing with this faction.

sell_ratio.description: Fraction of an item's base value the shop pays when a player sells to it. Defaults to 0.5 when omitted.

price.description: Explicit buy price. When omitted the item's own `value` is used.

min_reputation.description: Optional reputation gate. When set, the entry is only purchasable by a player whose standing with the shop's `faction_id` is at least this value; below it the entry lists as locked and cannot be bought. Requires `faction_id` to have any effect. Omit for an always-available entry.
